source.apiKeyPolicy: DART_API_KEY loaded from local .env and omitted from this artifact.

paperPolicy: This audit records what OpenDART provides. It does not define financial-company revenue. The paper-stage financial table uses revenue only when OpenDART provides an explicit 매출액, 영업수익, or 수익(매출액) account.
